infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: ServicePilot needs your location to record check-in/out GPS coordinates.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: ServicePilot needs background location to log your position while on duty.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: ServicePilot needs camera access to take job site photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: ServicePilot needs photo library access to attach photos to jobs.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: ServicePilot needs permission to save job photos to your photo library.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: ServicePilot needs location access to record your check-in/out coordinates.

plugins.photosPermission: ServicePilot needs photo access to attach images to jobs.
plugins.cameraPermission: ServicePilot needs camera access to take job site photos.

plugins.photosPermission: ServicePilot needs access to save job photos to your gallery.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: ServicePilot needs permission to save job photos to your gallery.
